title: salix × combinata
intro: Salix × combinata, also known as hybrid willow or black willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is a cross between the black willow (Salix nigra) and the sandbar willow (Salix exigua). This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Salix × combinata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe skin irritations. Salix × combinata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, and its bark is also used in traditional herbal remedies, although it's worth noting that its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional or herbalist.
